steps.title: Isolate the 16x term by subtracting 30
steps.content:
The given equation is:
$$16x + 30 = 190$$
All answer choices have the form $16x = c$, so we need to isolate $16x$ by subtracting 30 from both sides.

steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content:
Subtracting 30 from both sides:
$$16x = 190 - 30$$
$$16x = 160$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
